title: (Digital) Learning and student wellbeing - Englisch (open for 4EU+)

weeks.note: Link zur Teilnahme wird per Mail versendet
Link zur Teilnahme wird per Mail versendet.

further_info: If your studies present you with special challenges due to individual needs or impairments, please inform the responsible lecturer in advance or at the beginning of the course. We will then be happy to discuss how barrier-free participation in the course and the completion of examinations can be organised. Susanne Kemmer and Julia Heyne (student counsellors) and Christoph Schlomach (representative for students with disabilities and chronic illnesses) will be happy to answer any questions you may have about barrier-free teaching, compensation for disadvantages in examinations and support options at Heidelberg University. E-mail: inklusiv.studieren@uni-heidelberg.de.
